torch_pattern:
output_tensor = input_tensor_a @ input_tensor_b.to(input_tensor_a.dtype)
if bias is not None:
    output_tensor += bias
output_tensor = get_golden_function_for_activation(activation)(output_tensor)

config_template.call: ttnn.linear(x, weight, bias={BIAS}, activation={ACTIVATION}, memory_config={MEM_CONFIG}, dtype={DTYPE}, core_grid=ttnn.CoreGrid(y={GRID_Y}, x={GRID_X}), compute_kernel_config={COMPUTE_KERNEL_CONFIG})
config_template.notes: Activation may be fused either via the `activation=` kwarg (composite path, only when no program_config — call sites use `activation='silu' if not pc_1 else None`) or via program_config.fused_activation (e.g. fused_activation=[ttnn.UnaryOpType.GELU, True]). One call site warns: 'activation must be passed to linear here, not in program config! Bad output otherwise' for gelu in vision MLP.

weight_transform: Same as plain linear: transpose torch [out, in] weight to [in, out] before from_torch.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: MLP w1/gate output with fused silu, decode regime (no program_config)
placement_observations.source: MLP call site: w1_out = ttnn.linear(x, self.w1, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, activation='silu', core_grid=ttnn.CoreGrid(y=8, x=8))

placement_observations.size_descriptor: vision MLP c_fc with fused gelu, long image sequence (chunked to MAX_MM_SEQ_LEN)
placement_observations.source: c_fc_out = ttnn.linear(x_in, self.c_fc_weight, bias=..., activation='gelu', memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, program_config=pc_1)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: whisper FFN fc1+fc2: activations stay in L1 across both matmuls (one DRAM->L1, one L1->DRAM round trip per FFN)
placement_observations.source: whisper: h = ttnn.to_memory_config(hidden_states, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); h = ttnn.linear(h, fc1_weight, bias=fc1_bias, activation='gelu', memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); h = ttnn.linear(h, fc2_weight, ...)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small classifier heads / mnist MLP with fused relu, batch-row activations
placement_observations.source: mnist/vgg heads: ttnn.linear(x, fc.weight, bias=fc.bias, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, activation='relu')

placement_observations.size_descriptor: bert/distilbert FF1 with gelu_approx, batch-parameterized core grid
placement_observations.source: ttnn.linear(..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b, core_grid=ttnn.CoreGrid(y=batch_size, x=num_cores_x), activation='gelu_approx')
